reviews.review_title: A VR coaster without motion sickness
reviews.review_description:
Have tried a few VR coaster experiences and almost always have felt motion sickness. Read a couple reviews that said this one might be different, and for me at least it was true. And without the awkward comfort controls that blur or knock out peripheral vision. Don’t know what is different about this one but at last I was able to enjoy a virtual coaster without feeling queasy.
I know this game is no longer being supported and there are only five coasters but game cost about as much as one expansion bundle in Epic Roller Coasters. And the optional shooting game is the icing on the cake.
The one coaster game that is so smooth that I never get the slightest nausea playing. Always  good to come back to. I just wish there were more than 5 tracks
Super fun game! Just needs more updates.
Me and my lady had a lot of fun playing. Only thing missing is more maps. Needs a DLC with 3-5 more maps.

This is first time ever that I rank point 5 probably. This is amazing.
Especially, I really like Neon city and Himalaya stages. It feels like I ride real roller coaster.
Just great!!

reviews.review_title: Awsome and made for VR, details below
reviews.review_description:
There are other Rollercoaster games that are just for show, with great maps, but not really made for VR, because some of the moves are unnecessarily quick and make you sick. This one is not. 
Even in the fastest map, you get a sense of speed like no other, but no VR sickness, because they handled movement in an elegant way. 
You can enjoy rides with no complications, but you can also shoot map elements, or defend against projectiles coming your way.
I just wish there were more maps, otherwise this game is perfect for VR.

My husband showed me this on my new Meta Quest 3S. I didn’t know he was standing behind me mirroring my ride. I was in a rocker recliner. So he starts tilting my recliner forwards and backwards. Surprised the crap out of me and added a whole new detention to the game highly recommend you get a buddy and try this !  It’s sooooooo much fun.  Husband says an office chair would work better still, wonder how he knows this. I thought he went to “work” every day. Lol

This is hands down the best roller coaster game on Meta!! Dont feel any motion sickness on the roller coaster.

I like that there’s different mode options in the shooting game between easy, hard, and just enjoy the ride( without any shooting). 

Would buy any dlc if they make any roller coasters in the future.

reviews.review_title: Buyer Beware: Do not buy from seller
reviews.review_description: Meta does not screen the game companies that sell product on its platform. They take zero responsibility for who sells on this platform. The game crashes after purchasing and I cannot get help from the seller after contacting them for three months. The game crashes and will not start. Meta Store will not assist you if there is a problem with your game purchases and they take zero responsibility even though it’s their platforms. Be careful when it comes from buying on this platform period. It is not regulated.

I bought it after reading reviews from others who said this game was comfortable compared to others. Glad I did! Really fun game that I can spend a lot of time in without feeling sick. My only complaint is it needs more roller coasters but  still a great deal as is.
Is there a way for how I can just ride a roller coaster and don’t hit the things
Everytime I went to play it, it would immediately kick me out to my main lobby. I tried to uninstall and download it again a few times and still never worked.

Please please please can you add some more coaster courses , this game is just amazing , this really is a must have game and suitable for any age. You have to buy this game, the pictures don’t do this game justice and the only way to believe me is buy it I promise you won’t be disappointed
This is such an experience!! Please make a DLC pack with more coaster because I would be the first to buy!!!
Just needs more tracks now but id say one of the most enjoyable apps for all ages.
It is so fun 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Simple fun for the whole family
reviews.review_description:
You shoot targets from a rollercoaster. That's the whole game, and that's all you need!

Once your brain figures out you're not actually moving (after 2-3 rides), you can start to focus on hitting the targets. After that, there's just enough challenge and hidden bonuses to keep you playing for hours.

I hope they come out with a sequel with some kind of upgrades element. That would double the replay value.

The game is fun at first but once you pass all the levels , there is nothing really to come back for , there is only a handful of stages , they are fun and the graphics are crisp and smooth , the shooting works great, you might as well get epic roller coaster lnstead , more levels , and they update that game, because this game will never update and be anything more than what it is now . Fun for a while .

Several different coasters and challenges to play. The volcano ride has hints of Indiana Jones Temple of Doom. Enjoy the ride or play the game while riding. Never ending fun! Highly recommend you buy it. 
You won’t be Sorry!
Please can you add more rides.I only play this game although I've bought so many..It has become my only and favorite game..Please add more rides and carts. Is it possible to do that?🤔🤗
Definitely a lot of fun. Neon Hard level is pretty hard but finally doable. Great fun all around.
Superb games I rate it also brillant A1

Edited review: I had to knock it down since family sharing is not enabled on this app. It will be mandatory for all new apps going forward so not having it enabled is very disappointing given that 98% of apps opted in. I have a feeling that those who don’t will lose business. As I’m not willing to purchase again for same family members in same household. 

I LOVE this game. It’s good fun. However I’ve got a couple of issues that I think developers should consider:

1. How do you unlock gold rush it says 0/10. I’ve gotten gold cups in all four of 5 rides with a gold in the last. Do I have to get gold cups in all 5 first to unlock the second 5 awards?

2. Guns. They are too sluggish. They don’t fire quickly enough. In fact when I see the bonus coin, I shoot and it tends to stop working altogether. Most people are not ambidextrous so the argument of using both guns is silly - even more so when it’s moving. The guns need to be much faster in order to be able to get stuff - especially stuff that’s close together.

3. More rides!!! The graphics are great! I’d love to see more rides - I’d even pay to unlock them! 

Other than that - once 1 and 2 are fixed it’s a 5 star game.

developer_response.body:
Hello NikiNiki9Doors,
Gold Rush is unlocked by completing each track on both easy and hard difficulties with a gold medal (90% score or higher). 100% score or higher gets a gold trophy which also works for unlocking.
I hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: Controllers just need to vibrate when you shoot. That’s my only complaint really.

Excellent game , not over complicated,fun to play.
Can spend hours playing.

I absolutely love this fame!  I’ve got golds on the “easy” setting of each coaster, and I’m now working on the “hard” settings in order to unlock the bonus coaster.  I do believe the guns should be faster; the appear sluggish.
Great game,on my first try I was closing my eyes till I realized it was just a game
Please add more tracks

I'm a VR coaster collector. The shooting is fun but I enjoy the rides more than anything. I can't seem to find a setting that locks my point of view to the cart/track. You just kind of float above it while the cart has all the fun. Maybe I'm missing something? If not... feature request ;)
Coasters have nice long bends and turns which makes it comfortable to play.  Surprised by how much fun I'm having with this one.
Game is priced right for what you get.  Fun experience.  Probably a 3.5 for me, but it’s not too much money and it looks pretty good.

reviews.review_title: Fun and decent for the price
reviews.review_description:
This is the kind of game that is great for Friends and family to try the oculus experience. It’s a good one to share with people after they have tried RPE.

Each level is fun and not too tricky although the game play is a bit samey. It’s also good to have a game it two that you can play seated. 

Definitely worth sticking on your headset.
Love this game!!! I probably would never ride an actual roller coaster, however this game is exciting and will motivate you to ride all the time...and you get to shoot things!
Awesome game!! My family and I play this all the time. Sincerely hope that more add ons are added very soon.

I enjoy the game is exciting a lot of fun it needs them something more a couple of more tracks maybe so you can keep going go rush I like go rush but I don't like the fact that when she lose your gold coin you have to start all over again and if you get three and then you have to start over with you lose one it's okay I enjoy it though cuz just be a little bit more exciting it's exciting a little bit more

This game is so much fun to play. I really enjoy riding the coasters and trying to shoot the objects. The graphics are top notch, but I do hope that they add more tracks to play on. I love the ones where you seem to fly off the tracks and land back on them. Love this game and recommend it. Enjoy and hope to make it to gold mine soon.

Bought this game as it sounded like good fun and it certainly is. My wife and I are not gamers but this has been great entertainment for us while we cannot have family visits. When we first tried it we just stood up and the reactions were hilarious, really feels like you are on a real coaster. As others have said shooting helps, but I also found if you put s chair just behind you it gives you some sense of security and if you wanted you could also just sit down. Would really recommend this game. Thanks to the developers, great job.
Buy it

I felt in love with this  creation of Virtual Reality. 
After few days of using oculus quest 2, I start thinking, that will not finde something hot 🔥
But was surprised 
This game make you sweat to win.
Thank you!
I purchased this game and when i downloaded it it says it failed when i go to the app on my phone it just says purchased
